2026-04-22.content:
Cost optimization with Gemini Cloud Assist provides the following
additional features:

* In the Gemini Cloud Assist chat panel, get an explanation for
  cost changes for supported resources.
* On the Optimization page in Cloud Hub, get insights about recent
  cost changes and related changes in resource usage.

For more information, see
[Optimize costs with Gemini assistance](https://docs.cloud.google.com/hub/docs/optimize-gemini).

summary.title: Gemini Cloud Assist cost insights
summary.summary: Gemini Cloud Assist now offers enhanced cost optimization features. You can get explanations for cost changes directly in the chat panel and detailed insights on the Optimization page, linking cost changes to resource usage. This helps you better understand and manage your cloud spending.

2026-04-22.content:
[App Topology](https://docs.cloud.google.com/hub/docs/app-topology)  is in
[Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products#product-launch-stages).
App Topology lets you query data about your resources and applications
from multiple sources, and then view the correlated data as a topology graph.

summary.title: App Topology Now in Preview
summary.summary: App Topology is now available in Preview. This feature allows you to query and visualize correlated data from multiple resource and application sources as a topology graph.

2026-04-14.content:
The Deployments page supports viewing
[recent application deployments](https://docs.cloud.google.com/hub/docs/deployments#view-deployments) to
Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) and Cloud Run.

summary.title: View Recent Application Deployments
summary.summary: The Deployments page now allows you to see recent application deployments to Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) and Cloud Run. This feature provides a consolidated view of your application's deployment history on these platforms.

2026-04-10.content:
The Maintenance page supports
[viewing maintenance activities](https://docs.cloud.google.com/hub/docs/maintenance) for App Hub
applications that you have created in [App Hub](https://docs.cloud.google.com/app-hub/docs/overview)
or [Application Design Center](https://docs.cloud.google.com/application-design-center/docs/overview).
This feature is in [Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products#product-launch-stages).

summary.title: Maintenance page now available
summary.summary: The Maintenance page in App Hub now allows you to view maintenance activities for your applications. This feature, currently in Preview, provides insights into upcoming and ongoing maintenance for applications created in App Hub or Application Design Center.

summary.title: Security and compliance in Cloud Hub now in preview
summary.summary: Security and compliance features for Cloud Hub are now available in preview. This allows users to explore and test enhanced security and compliance capabilities within the platform before general availability.

summary.title: Cloud Hub is Now Generally Available
summary.summary: The Cloud Hub platform has reached general availability, offering a new way to manage your cloud resources. Explore its capabilities and streamline your operations today.

2025-11-14.content: You can now view [Active Assist cost optimization recommendations](https://docs.cloud.google.com/hub/docs/optimize) in Cloud Hub is now in [Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products#product-launch-stages).

summary.title: Active Assist cost optimization recommendations available in Cloud Hub
summary.summary: Cloud cost optimization recommendations are now available for preview in Cloud Hub.

2025-10-27.content:
All scheduled and started maintenance activities are now listed together on
the [Maintenance page](https://docs.cloud.google.com/hub/docs/maintenance). You can use the
more\_vert **Settings** menu for scheduled
activities that you can modify.

summary.title: Maintenance Updates
summary.summary: All scheduled and started maintenance activities are now consolidated on the Maintenance page. Use the Settings menu for modifiable scheduled activities.
